item.title: Bedtime Story

item.title: A stripper aka a qualified woman for Congress. Alexandra Hunt. Pennsylvania
item.description:
I've been a stripper. I'm a sexual assault survivor. And I've had an abortion. This ad is my story — but also the story of so many others. Never again will they be able to force us to live in the shadows, in shame for our lived experiences. Let’s come together and destigmatize having a past. Join our movement ? @alexandramhunt.com https://youtu.be/Z-FBJTK8bhI
https://youtu.be/Z-FBJTK8bhI https://www.facebook.com/AlexandraHuntForCongress. Show her support!
item.dc:creator: PterodactylSpicyKurbis

item.title: Retired US Army General on why Russia is taking so many casualties in Ukraine
item.description:
Gen. Hertling is the former commanding officer of the First Armored Division and also served for a period as overall commander of US Army forces in Europe.
On March 21, Komsomolskaya Pravda, a pro-Kremlin tabloid, published figures on their website saying 9,861 Russian soldiers have died in Ukraine and 16,153 have been injured.
This was ostensibly their way of pushing back against Ukrainian claims of Russian losses: "See? It's not actually that bad." The figures were quickly removed. If it wasn't clear, if these are the numbers Russia admits to, the real numbers are certainly worse.
As a comparison: 15,000 Russian troops died in 10 years in Afghanistan in the 70's and 80's. US deaths over 20 years in Afghanistan and Iraq were about 6000.
https://twitter.com/MarkHertling
item.dc:creator: JohnnyGossamer

item.title: Oh, we definitely evolved from monkeys
item.dc:creator: trustfallaccident

item.title: 50 lb loss
item.description: I started 2.5 years ago. I've been nearly same weight for over a year. I guess thats maintaining? Still want to make progress. 2 kids, PCOS, working mom. I prioritize myself. I focus on creating healthy habits. Movement, healthy diet, nothing too dramatic. I'm too close to an overweight BMI, it messes with my mind. But I can't go back, can't give up. I'll continue working on the inside until I feel better on the outside. My biggest solo accomplishment has been a half marathon. Getting ready for a full, but have to mix in moving, building a house, kid starting kindergarten, and marriage. One day.
item.dc:creator: Monkeysboobsbutts

item.title: Anti-Vaxxer explains Freedom of Speech in the most ironic way possible.
item.description: After Searching , his name is Randy Ireland from NYC and he's a proud boy, he gets called up on a stage to give a speech on January 6 prosecutions and Capitol rally He has a video they put up a banner saying "free political prisoners" or similar about Jan 6th and he gets called up on a stage to give a speech. here is the images and video : https://tllg.me/VBoQX

item.title: Sooooooo Boring!!!
item.description: I have been listening to the hearing of Supreme Court nominee Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson and it is sooooo boring! So dull! All about substance and character. I mean, c’mon, when is she going to cry? When is she going to say how much she likes beer? #dissapointed BORRRRING!!
item.dc:creator: 103Brewer
